claims.text: We claim: 1. A pharmaceutical formulation which is an emulsion for intravenous administration and which comprises a) a short-acting dihydropyridine compound having a half-life in plasma of less than 3...

use_codes.desc: CLEVIPREX IS A DIHYDROPYRIDINE CALCIUM CHANNEL BLOCKER INDICATED FOR THE REDUCTION OF BLOOD PRESSURE WHEN ORAL THERAPY IS NOT FEASIBLE OR NOT DESIRABLE
